name: CDIF Reference
abstract: A typed reference to an external entity, combining the schema.org labeled-link surface (name, description, url) with the DDI-CDI dt-Reference semantics (uri, description) and an optional cdif:semantic role expressed as a SKOS Concept. Replaces direct use of schemaorgProperties/labeledLink whenever a reference needs an explicit semantic role or DDI-CDI provenance. Defines properties: @type (must include 'cdif:Reference'), schema:name, schema:description, schema:url (required), cdi:uri, cdi:description, cdif:semantic (skos:Concept).

sources.title: Discovery issue 13 - distinct assertions about sample registration vs physical object
